data.name: 和你想睡的人上床吧
data.detailed_description:
You and your buddy, under a sky full of stars, talk about deep stuff… like sex. What could be deeper than that? You share your most intimate desires. And then, by chance and luck, a shooting star crosses the sky and both of you wish to fuck the girls and fictional characters you love most. Of course, it’s about to happen.

→ If you’re into your friend’s mom, fantasize about your favorite porn actress, and can’t stop thinking about the protagonist of the novel you’re reading… this game is for you:

👠 Cassandra is your friend’s mother and the ultimate MILF. Like wine or cheese, she gets better with age. She seduces effortlessly and dominates without asking. With her, you never know if you’re playing… or if you’ve already lost.

💄 You see Scarlett X on your screen every night before going to sleep. She doesn’t just act desire… she controls it. Charismatic, playful, and unapologetic, she toys with boundaries until they vanish.

💚 Sylwen is the protagonist of the book “The Legacy of the Red Moon.” She holds the power of an ancient curse… and the body of a temptation. When she looks at you up close, it’s hard to think of anything but touching her.

→ If you like your friend’s sister, daydream about the heroine of your favorite video game, and can’t stop staring at your psychology professor… this is for you:

💋 Aria is your friend’s sister. Sweet, smart, and charming… until she lowers her gaze and you realize she’s looking exactly where you want her to. Everyone wants to protect her, but the truth is, she doesn’t need protection. What she wants is between your legs.

⚔️ Nyxara is the heroine of your video game… until you find a hidden option in the menu: Enter the game. Then, she’s no longer just a character. She speaks in a soft voice, but leaves you trembling. She doesn’t need to touch you to turn you on… just saying your name, slowly, like she already knows why you’re here, is enough.

📖 Tessa teaches Psychology at university, but what she really teaches isn’t always in the notes. She talks about repressed desires, about how the mind hides behind what we say… but the way she looks at you dismantles any theory. Every class feels like a clinical analysis of what you’re afraid to admit. And every time you listen to her, you’re not sure if you’re taking notes or about to confess something.

FEATURES

  • Finally: animations! Some girls feature a special animated scene.

  • Visual Novel++ Format: Each girl has different story arcs that complete her own narrative.

  • No Censorship!: We've removed censorship from the images (we’ll add an option later to censor them as preferred).

  • Gallery: Fill an image album as you progress through the story and revisit the chapters you've completed.

  • Choose your protagonist: Pick one of two characters to experience a different story.

  • Flashback: Go back in the story at any time to change a decision or relive a moment.

  • Smooth Navigation: Choose whether text progresses automatically or skip it to reach your favorite part.

  • Immersive Audio: Including music, sound effects, voices, and "other effects." Adjust volume settings independently or mute everything.

PLEASE NOTE

  • All characters depicted and visually represented in this game are over 18 years old, and no real or identifiable minors were used in the production of this game.

  • Help us out! If you think you can improve the narrative in your language, feel free to send us your suggestions via email or message us on our Steam page.

  • We're still working on it: All updates and improvements we develop will be added to the game at no additional cost.

data.short_description: A shooting star crosses the sky… and this time it doesn’t grant you health or fortune, but your dirtiest wish: to sleep with those girls you obsess over, real or fictional. Of flesh and bone, or ink and pixels.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 韓文, 日文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: WIN XP/Vista/7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2048 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 Compatible Graphics Card
  • 儲存空間: 2048 MB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
